closed_positions.name: Photronics, Inc.
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: PLAB has declined -36.42% (1-day) and -31.73% (5-day) on 8.38x volume — magnitude far exceeds sympathy-fade thesis. Flag confidence dropped to 2, flagged thesis explicitly states 'Cannot confidently classify as pure sympathy-fade without confirming no negative catalyst.' Days held = 8; if catalyst is company-specific (earnings, guidance, customer loss), sympathy thesis is invalidated. EXIT per Screen 1 discipline: broken thesis overrides holding window.

closed_positions.name: Verra Mobility Corporation
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: VRRM is in catastrophic drawdown: -71.82% after day 0 on the Google Search I/O trigger. The current flag re-surfaces VRRM with threat_assessment='none' and strong filings evidence (municipal contracts, camera hardware, court-admissible evidentiary chains have zero search-overhaul exposure). However, the 10-Q already flags a critical real risk: 'loss of one of the three large Commercial Services customers currently in renewal.' This is NOT sympathy-fade territory; this is idiosyncratic deterioration on a real business risk. The -71% move suggests the market has priced in customer loss or regulatory bans (Ontario speed-enforcement ban is real). Holding a position this destroyed on a 5-15 day clock violates the discipline — the sympathy thesis is drowned out by fundamental risk. Exit immediately.

closed_positions.name: nCino, Inc.
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: NCNO was flagged on day 0, already down 5.02% intraday. The current flag re-surfaces NCNO with identical Google Search trigger and notes threat_assessment='minimal' (not 'none'), and the filings evidence shows generic AI/ML competitive risk language rather than crisp evidence of no search-agent pathway into regulated banking workflows. The flag itself acknowledges 'sympathy drop is thematic SaaS-is-doomed reflex' — which means the panic may not be unjustified, just premature. More critically: day-0 entry + immediate 5% drawdown on a short-window thesis signals poor entry timing. Exit to preserve capital and reduce sector concentration (currently 4 tech positions, 3 of which are day-0 or underwater).

closed_positions.name: Blackbaud, Inc.
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: 5 days held; -2.91% unrealized loss and stock trading below cost basis despite the Google I/O catalyst being old news by now. The thesis (cloud-based SaaS untouched by AI agents) is mechanically sound, but the sympathy fade is not materializing as expected — price has not recovered. Trim 50% to cut tail risk and lock dry powder; reassess BLKB's thesis strength vs. broader SaaS momentum before day 10. (partial)
